subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been heard, and thy lamentation hath been hearkened unto. In tribulations and calamities, follow thou the path of truth - that is to say, be patient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت شنیده شد و ناله ات اصغا گشت در بلایا و رزایا بحق اقتدا کن یعنی صابر و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @justice and wrath of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
